overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character holding a torch walking through an ancient walled compound at night. The character approaches and passes through a large wooden gate into an open grassy field, with the scene illuminated by warm torchlight against dark surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled compound interior with wooden scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the wooden gate while holding a torch

entered.detail: rustic wooden platform structure with hay underneath
rough stone wall forming the left boundary of the compound
rough stone wall forming the right boundary of the compound
large double wooden doors set in stone frame
stone archway surrounding the wooden gate

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a walled compound at night, illuminated by torchlight. A wooden scaffolding structure stands to the left while stone walls line both sides. The camera approaches a large wooden gate with a stone frame straight ahead.

events.description: passing through the wooden gate from the enclosed compound to the open field

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow gate opening into the field beyond

entered.detail: grassy field extending into the distance under night sky
dark silhouettes of trees on the horizon
small trees and bushes dotting the field edges

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the narrow gate passage, transitioning from the enclosed compound to the open field. The wooden gate doors swing past on either side as the open landscape becomes visible ahead, with distant trees silhouetted against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy field with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking across the open field away from the compound, exploring the dark landscape

entered.detail: small trees and bushes dotting the left side of the field
vague dark shape of a building or structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: Now in the open field, the camera continues forward through grass and scattered vegetation. The stone walls and gate recede behind as the character explores the dark landscape, with a distant ruin barely visible ahead in the torchlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a walled compound into a vast, dark open field. It begins within the enclosure, moving past a wooden scaffolding structure and stone walls toward a large wooden gate. As the camera passes through the narrow stone frame, the wooden doors swing open to reveal a transition from the enclosed architecture to an expansive landscape with distant trees silhouetted against the night sky. The scene then opens fully into a grassy field, where the camera continues forward through scattered vegetation as the gate recedes into the darkness. Finally, the movement pushes deeper into the open terrain, with the torchlight barely illuminating a distant ruin ahead.
